message:
fix(ft-serialize): fail closed on integer/bool dtypes in SafeTensors bridge (frankentorch-4tn)

The DenseTensor SafeTensors bridge previously mapped I64/I32/BOOL to
FrankenTorch dtypes in both directions, but load_safetensors_from_bytes only
reconstructs floating-point DenseTensors and would silently produce garbage
or panic on integer/bool payloads. Both ft_dtype_to_st and st_dtype_to_ft now
return TensorIOError::Corrupt with explicit diagnostic messages for these
dtypes instead of mapping them. Added two regression tests verifying that
loading an I64 and a BOOL SafeTensors blob both fail with a Corrupt error.
Minor import re-ordering for rustfmt compliance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
